name: Albright Park
description: Albright Park is a place to play pickleball in Winfield, KS. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts.
open_play_schedule: Follow @WinfieldPickleball on Facebook for most current schedule. Usually daily 8am-10pm; Tuesday/Thursday 6-8pm

name: Arkansas City Rec Center
description: Come play pickleball at Arkansas City Rec Center in Arkansas City, KS! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Basketball Barn
description: Basketball Barn is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Udall, KS. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Cherry Street Park
description: Cherry Street Park is a place to play pickleball in Winfield, KS. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. Players have access to lights.

name: Cochran Park
description: Cochran Park is a place to play pickleball in Winfield, KS. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.
